properties.remark: THE NUNES DAIRY WEST-SOUTHWEST OF BUHL LOST ITS ROOF TO STRONG WINDS AROUND 8 PM MDT. A TRAMPOLINE AND SWING SET NEARBY WERE ALSO DAMAGED.
MESONET STATION HBFI1 HORSE BUTTE.
ESTIMATED EF0. ON GROUND 15 MINUTES.
FACEBOOK PHOTO.
VIA SOCIAL MEDIA.
LARGE HAIL COVERING THE GROUND. VIA SOCIAL MEDIA.
VIA PHOTO ON SOCIAL MEDIA.
CORRECTS PREVIOUS HAIL REPORT FROM 2 SSW GLENNS FERRY. VIA PHOTO ON SOCIAL MEDIA.
VIA SOCIAL MEDIA.
MULTIPLE SOCIAL MEDIA REPORTS AND PHOTOS OF 1.0 INCH HAIL.
VIA PHOTO ON SOCIAL MEDIA.
VIA SOCIAL MEDIA.
VIA SOCIAL MEDIA.

LARGE TREE PARTIALLY WAS UPROOTED AND FELL ON HOUSE NEAR EAST 2ND AVENUE IN MOUNTAIN HOME. NUMEROUS SMALL BRANCHES DOWN WITH DIAMETERS OF 1 TO 2 INCHES. PORTA POTTY BLOWN OVER NEAR ROSEWOOD PARK. DAMAGE OCCURED DURING THUNDERSTORM WITH BRIEF HEAVY RAIN WHICH WAS DESCRIBED AS A WET DOWNBURST.
MESONET STATION PCKI1 POLE CREEK.
MESONET STATION RTFO3 RED BUTTE.
RABBIT CREEK PWS STATION. REPORTED 0.92 INCHES OF RAINFALL STORM TOTAL.
VIA SOCIAL MEDIA. TIME ESTIMATED.
3 TREES BLOWN DOWN. VIA SOCIAL MEDIA. TIME ESTIMATED BASED ON RADAR.
VIA SOCIAL MEDIA. TIME IS ESTIMATED FROM RADAR.
1/2 HAIL REPORTED; THUNDERSTORM POWERLINE WIND DAMAGE.
VIA SOCIAL MEDIA. TIME ESTIMATED FROM RADAR.
HAIL RANGING FROM QUARTER TO PING PONG. VIA SOCIAL MEDIA.
VIA SOCIAL MEDIA. TIME IS APPROXIMATE.
1 DIAMETER TREE LIMBS DOWN. WINDS ESTIMATED TO BE 50-60 MPH. NICKEL HAIL.
SPOTTER REPORTED ISOLATED GOLF BALL SIZE HAIL DROPPING OUT OF PASSING THUNDERSTORM.
THERE WERE REPORTS ON SOCIAL MEDIA ABOUT THUNDERSTORM OUTFLOW WINDS THAT KNOCKED DOWN SEVERAL LARGE TREES AND POWER LINES. MCCALL AIRPORT RECORDED A PEAK WIND GUST OF 45 MPH.
ROOF DAMAGE FROM LARGE FALLEN TREE.
VIS REDUCED TO 1/4 STATUTE MILES IN BLOWING DUST.
AT KBNO
MESONET STATION PCKI1 POLE CREEK.
